name: divband
description: Monorepo for the divband multi-tenant website hosting platform.

scripts.dev:backend: API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 PUBLIC_SITE_DOMAIN=localhost.test UPLOAD_DOMAIN=uploads.localhost.test DATABASE_URL=sqlite://./data/divband-backend.sqlite GITLAB_URL=https://gitlab.com KUBERNETES_CONFIG_MODE=disabled OBJECT_STORAGE_BUCKET=divband-local OBJECT_STORAGE_REGION=us-east-1 npm run dev --workspace @divband/backend
scripts.dev:mvp: sh -c 'npm run dev:backend & backend_pid=$!; trap "kill $backend_pid" INT TERM EXIT; sleep 2; npm run dev:frontend'
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run smoke:controls --workspace @divband/backend && npm run smoke:restore --workspace @divband/backend && npm run smoke:publish --workspace @divband/backend
